name_cn:

Latest color Bobby series, named in honor of Monsieur DI0R's pet dog, symbolizing loyalty and success, so this is a bag that can accompany you forever😘, combining classic and fashion, retro shape interprets the freedom, confidence and elegance of independent women💃🏻, love it to death❤️
